name: Baby Doll Snack Play Set - Gigglescape™: Doll Accessories with Food, Utensils, Plate, Fits All Sizes 13-Piece Kit
description:
Your little one will love pretending to feed a baby of their own with the Baby Doll Snack Play Set from Gigglescape™. This play set include play crackers, strawberries halves, a carrot, cheese slices, apple slices, fork, knife, and a container to provide countless hours of fun at home. Great for use with any baby doll, this set is made from plastic and recommended for toddlers ages two and up.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
